note: Explorer UTXO list: distinguish CHANGE-self outputs from real incoming TRANSFERs + footer totals. (1) New async enrichment in showAddress: after the address renders, kick off Promise.all of gettransaction calls for every unique non-coinbase source TXID. For each UTXO, mark u.change_self=true if any input of its source TX belongs to the same address. Re-render the visible UTXO page once enrichment completes. (2) _buildUtxoRow now reads u.change_self: when true AND the UTXO type is OUT_TRANSFER (type=0), the TYPE column shows CHANGE in muted color with a tooltip explaining it is the unspent remainder of an outgoing TX, not an incoming payment. Falls back to the legacy txidCounts>1 && vout>0 heuristic when enrichment has not completed yet. (3) New footer below the UTXO table aggregates: matured-spendable amount + count (green), immature lottery pending amount + count (magenta), and immature coinbase pending amount + count (yellow when present). Lets the reader tell at a glance how much SOST is actually available to move right now vs. waiting on maturity. NO consensus / RPC / node / miner / wallet / wire-format change. NO new endpoints; uses existing gettransaction. Pure JS display layer in sost-explorer.html.
